zh.lifeSummary: 當Malcolm Crawford於大約1320年出生在蘇格蘭雷福福爾格林可時，他的父親Roger Crawford41歲，母親Helen de Abernethy28歲。他和Margaret Galbraith至少有6個兒子和5個女兒。他去世於1390年在他的家鄉享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Malcolm Crawford于大约1320年出生在苏格兰雷福福爾格林可时，他的父亲Roger Crawford41岁，母亲Helen de Abernethy28岁。他和Margaret Galbraith至少有6个儿子和5个女儿。他去世于1390年在他的家乡享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Crawford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: habitational name from any of various places called Crawford, primarily the one in Lanarkshire (Scotland), and possibly also from the one in Lancashire. Both are named in Old English with crāwe ‘crow’ + ford ‘ford’.

variants.name: Crafford
meanings: English (Cumberland) and Scottish: variant of   Crawford  .

variants.name: Crofoot
meanings: English: variant ofCrowfoot, a nickname for someone with splayed feet or someother deformity of the foot, from Old English crāwe ‘crow’ +fōt ‘foot’. In Middle English crou-fot also denotedthe buttercup, and it may be from this sense that the name arose,although the reason for its adoption is unclear.

variants.name: Crofut
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of Crawford or Crowfoot (see Crofoot ).

nameMeanings.name: Malcolm
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of the medieval Gaelic name Mael Coluim ‘devotee of St Columba’. Columba was a 6th-century monk of Irish origin who played a leading part in the conversion to Christianity of Scotland and northern England; see also Callum and Colm . He has always been one of the most popular saints in Scotland, but in the Middle Ages it was felt to be presumptuous to give the names of saints directly to children; instead their blessing was invoked by prefixing the name with mael ‘devotee of’ or gille ‘servant of’. Since the 1930s the given name has been used widely in the English-speaking world, not just by those with Scottish connections.

en.lifeSummary: When Malcolm Crawford was born about 1320, in Greenock, Renfrewshire, Scotland, his father, Roger Crawford, was 41 and his mother, Helen de Abernethy, was 28. He had at least 6 sons and 5 daughters with Margaret Galbraith. He died in 1390, in his hometown, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Malcolm Crawford est né environ 1320, à Greenock, Renfrewshire, Écosse, son père, Roger Crawford, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Helen de Abernethy, avait 28 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles avec Margaret Galbraith. Il est décédé en 1390, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Malcolm Crawford um 1320 in Greenock, Renfrewshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Crawford 41 und seine Mutter Helen de Abernethy 28. Er hatte mit Margaret Galbraith mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1390 im Alter von 71 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Malcolm Crawford è nato il circa 1320 nel Greenock, Renfrewshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Roger Crawford, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Helen de Abernethy, aveva 28 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie con Margaret Galbraith. Morì nel 1390, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Malcolm Crawfordが約1320年にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアグレエノックで生まれた時，父Roger Crawfordは41歳，母Helen de Abernethyは28歳であった。彼はMargaret Galbraithとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼は1390年に故郷で71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Malcolm Crawford(이)가 대략 1320년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 그린옥크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Crawford(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Helen de Abernethy(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Margaret Galbraith(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1390년 그의 고향에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Malcolm Crawford nasceu aproximadamente 1320, em Greenock, Renfrewshire, Scotland, seu pai, Roger Crawford, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Helen de Abernethy, tinha 28 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas com Margaret Galbraith. Ele faleceu em 1390, em sua cidade natal, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Malcolm Crawford родился около 1320 г. в местности гринокк, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Roger Crawford было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Helen de Abernethy, 28. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей от Margaret Galbraith. Он умер в 1390 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Malcolm Crawford nació aproximadamente 1320, en Greenock, Renfrewshire, Scotland, su papá, Roger Crawford, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Helen de Abernethy, tenía 28 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas con Margaret Galbraith. Murió en 1390, en su pueblo, a la edad de 71 años.
